title: Bent Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Internal exploit via manual adjustment of rewards balance

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manually adjusts balances of reward addresses

red_flags: Large withdrawals shortly after small deposits
summary: An internal exploit was used to manually adjust the balance of the exploiter's address on Bent Finance, resulting in the transfer of ~$1.75M worth of tokens. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transactions that manually adjust balances of reward addresses.
